sentiment: We race toward what we think we want, but the real discovery was always here, waiting behind a door we hadn't opened.

stories.title: LoRA Speedrun – a public wall-clock leaderboard for fine-tuning techniques
stories.summary: A public leaderboard that races fine-tuning techniques against the clock, turning capability into a competition.

stories.title: Xiaomi-Robotics-1
stories.summary: Xiaomi opens its embodied robotics platform, inviting others to give machines presence in the physical world.

stories.title: Sealed tomb filled with paintings and inscriptions discovered in Egypt
stories.summary: A sealed tomb opens after millennia, revealing paintings and inscriptions that were always there, waiting for someone to find them.
